spec_match.rationale: Builds 8 cells, each a real `new VideoFrame(canvas, { rotation, flip })` covering the four rotation × two flip combinations. That is the canonical EXIF orientation matrix the API now expresses natively.

interactive.rationale: Source-orientation select + flip checkbox feed the matrix; the cells re-render live as VideoFrames each frame and the user can see all 8 outcomes simultaneously.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Index promises `all eight EXIF orientations on one screen: rotation × flip matrix` with `each cell built as a real new VideoFrame(canvas, { rotation, flip })`; the page delivers exactly that.

edge_cases.rationale: All 8 orientations are present by construction — strong on the matrix coverage — but it never shows the case where rotation defaults to 0 (no metadata at all), nor what an asymmetric source canvas reveals about each transform beyond what is visible.

references.rationale: `see also` now cites `https://chromestatus.com/feature/5128855343595520` plus the WebCodecs `VideoFrame.rotation` and `VideoFrame.flip` spec sections.

design_system.rationale: Inline styles use raw hex (`#fdfcf8`, `#0022ff`) instead of variables, breaking invariant #5. Variable use elsewhere is fine.

openQuestions.title: Replace raw hex backgrounds with variables
openQuestions.detail: `#fdfcf8` and `#0022ff` are inline-styled. Use `--bg-ivory` / `--accent-blue` from `public/styles.css` so the matrix tracks the design system.

openQuestions.title: Add the `no metadata` reference cell
openQuestions.detail: All 8 cells construct frames with explicit rotation+flip. Add a 9th tile that constructs `new VideoFrame(canvas, {})` (no orientation properties) and shows the source-orientation passthrough — that is the implicit default the spec lets the field disappear into.

openQuestions.title: Use an asymmetric source so each cell is unambiguous
openQuestions.detail: If the source canvas is symmetric, half the cells look identical. Ensure the painted source is asymmetric in both axes (an `F` glyph or arrow) so every cell is visibly distinct from every other.

summary: Strong matrix-style spec teach — eight live VideoFrames covering the full rotation×flip space — and the required ChromeStatus/WebCodecs references are now present. It still slips a couple of raw hex colours past the design system; variables and a `no metadata` reference cell would finish it.
